summary: HotelRunner Provider Parity Testing - All 15 tests passed. Mock server (localhost:9999) is running and responding correctly. Webhook endpoints accept reservations and process through ingest pipeline. Normalizer correctly parses HotelRunner API format.

minor.issue: Webhooks result in 'pending_mapping' status because test-tenant-e2e lacks room mappings. This is expected behavior - not a bug.

critical_code_review_comments: Mock server implementation is comprehensive with auth validation, error injection, rate limiting, and realistic data generation
Normalizer correctly handles both HotelRunner API format (firstname/lastname, checkin_date, address.email, rooms[].room_code, state) and simplified format

Ingest pipeline correctly processes through all 9 stages: duplicate detection, payload hash check, stale detection, normalization, mapping resolution, decision engine, concurrency control, and execution
Webhook endpoints properly validate tenant_id header and return appropriate error codes
seed_data_creation: None required - mock server generates test data automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: HotelRunner mock server runs on port 9999 via supervisor (hr_mock service). Valid credentials: token=mock-hr-token-001, hr_id=HR-HOTEL-001. Webhook endpoints require X-Tenant-ID header. Room mappings for test-tenant-001 exist but test-tenant-e2e does not have mappings configured.

mocked_apis_list: http://localhost:9999 - Full HotelRunner API mock (auth, rooms, reservations, ARI push, delivery ACK, error injection)
